Interface IRPFItemURI

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an RPF or DTED item URI.

[Guid("011B6933-85C1-408B-9A2E-D7E676936063")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRPFItemURI

Properties

CompilationDate

The data compilation date associated with the DTED file.

string CompilationDate { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DTEDEdition

The data edition associated with the DTED file.

string DTEDEdition { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Latitude

The latitude associated with the DTED file.

string Latitude { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Longitude

The longitude associated with the DTED file.

string Longitude { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaintenanceDate

The maintenance date associated with the DTED file.

string MaintenanceDate { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ProductionDate

Production date associated with the RPF file.

string ProductionDate { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Version

The data version associated with the RPF/DTED file.

string Version { get; set; }

Property Value

string
